c.d: Cleanliness, intuitiveness, and customizability of the user interface.
Availability and seamless syncing across multiple operating systems (iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Web).
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Product Specifications

c.d: Variety and usefulness of features such as text formatting, image/file attachment, task management, collaboration, and offline access.
Cost of the app (free, freemium, subscription) and value for money.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, In-app purchase information

c.d: Consistency and speed of syncing notes across devices.
